sql_array: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_table; CREATE TABLE test_table(a UInt32, b Float64, c Float64, d Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_table SET b = b + 1.0 WHERE a = 2;
SELECT arrayMap(x -> round(x, 2), arrayJoin(corrMatrix(b, c, d))) AS corrMatrix FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table_copy AS test_table ENGINE = Memory;
